name: CodeEditor
description: Source-code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with on-demand language packs, dark/light/auto theming, and line numbers.

api.name: CodeEditor
api.description: Source-code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with on-demand language packs, dark/light/auto theming, and line numbers.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The document text. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged; when bound, an incoming change that doesn't match the last value this editor pushed is treated as authoritative and rolls CodeMirror back via setValue. Unbound (uncontrolled) usage only re-syncs on a genuine parameter change, so the caret and in-flight typing survive unrelated re-renders.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised on every edit with the document's current text.

parameters.name: Language
parameters.description: Source language. Currently supported: csharp, javascript, typescript, html, css, json, markdown, xml, sql, python, plaintext. Unknown values fall back to plaintext.

parameters.name: Theme
parameters.description: light | dark | auto (follows page theme via the `dark` class on <html>).

parameters.name: Height
parameters.description: CSS height of the editor viewport (e.g. 400px, 100%). Applied as an inline style on the CodeMirror host element.

parameters.name: LineNumbers
parameters.description: Shows the gutter line-number column. Default true.

parameters.name: ReadOnly
parameters.description: Makes the document non-editable (CodeMirror's read-only mode) and sets role="document" instead of role="textbox" for assistive tech.

parameters.name: ShowMinimap
parameters.description: Shows a scrollbar-side minimap of the document. CodeMirror 6 has no built-in minimap, so this lazily loads the @@replit/codemirror-minimap extension from EsmBase on first enable. If that import fails (e.g. offline with no self-hosted copy of the package) the editor degrades gracefully — the rest of the editor keeps working, just without a minimap. Toggling at runtime adds/removes the extension without losing selection or scroll position.

parameters.name: EsmBase
parameters.description: Base URL the CodeMirror core, language packs, theme, and minimap are imported from. Defaults to the public esm.sh CDN. Point this at a self-hosted ESM mirror (or a path served by your own app) for air-gapped / offline / strict-CSP deployments — e.g. EsmBase="/_content/MyApp/esm" or EsmBase="https://esm.myco.internal". A trailing slash is optional. When null, falls back to the global window.lumeoCdn.codeMirrorBase override (if set) and then esm.sh.

parameters.name: TabSize
parameters.description: Number of columns a tab/indent level occupies. Default 4.

parameters.name: UseTabs
parameters.description: Inserts literal tab characters on Tab instead of spaces sized to TabSize. Default false (spaces).

parameters.name: Placeholder
parameters.description: Placeholder text shown when the document is empty; also used as the element's aria-label when set.

parameters.name: OnChange
parameters.description: Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root wrapper div.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised on every edit with the document's current text.

events.name: OnChange
events.description: Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs.

mdSummary:
# CodeEditor

Source-code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with on-demand language packs, dark/light/auto theming, and line numbers.

**Package:** `Lumeo.CodeEditor` · **Category:** Forms
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/code-editor

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| CodeEditor | Value | `string?` | `` | The document text. Two-way bindable via ValueChanged; when bound, an incoming change that doesn't match the last value this editor pushed is treated as authoritative and rolls CodeMirror back via setValue. Unbound (uncontrolled) usage only re-syncs on a genuine parameter change, so the caret and in-flight typing survive unrelated re-renders. |
| CodeEditor | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Raised on every edit with the document's current text. |
| CodeEditor | Language | `string` | `"plaintext"` | Source language. Currently supported: csharp, javascript, typescript, html, css, json, markdown, xml, sql, python, plaintext. Unknown values fall back to plaintext. |
| CodeEditor | Theme | `string` | `"auto"` | light \| dark \| auto (follows page theme via the `dark` class on <html>). |
| CodeEditor | Height | `string` | `"400px"` | CSS height of the editor viewport (e.g. 400px, 100%). Applied as an inline style on the CodeMirror host element. |
| CodeEditor | LineNumbers | `bool` | `true` | Shows the gutter line-number column. Default true. |
| CodeEditor | ReadOnly | `bool` | `false` | Makes the document non-editable (CodeMirror's read-only mode) and sets role="document" instead of role="textbox" for assistive tech. |
| CodeEditor | ShowMinimap | `bool` | `false` | Shows a scrollbar-side minimap of the document. CodeMirror 6 has no built-in minimap, so this lazily loads the @@replit/codemirror-minimap extension from EsmBase on first enable. If that import fails (e.g. offline with no self-hosted copy of the package) the editor degrades gracefully — the rest of the editor keeps working, just without a minimap. Toggling at runtime adds/removes the extension without losing selection or scroll position. |
| CodeEditor | EsmBase | `string?` | `` | Base URL the CodeMirror core, language packs, theme, and minimap are imported from. Defaults to the public esm.sh CDN. Point this at a self-hosted ESM mirror (or a path served by your own app) for air-gapped / offline / strict-CSP deployments — e.g. EsmBase="/_content/MyApp/esm" or EsmBase="https://esm.myco.internal". A trailing slash is optional. When null, falls back to the global window.lumeoCdn.codeMirrorBase override (if set) and then esm.sh. |
| CodeEditor | TabSize | `int` | `4` | Number of columns a tab/indent level occupies. Default 4. |
| CodeEditor | UseTabs | `bool` | `false` | Inserts literal tab characters on Tab instead of spaces sized to TabSize. Default false (spaces). |
| CodeEditor | WordWrap | `string` | `"off"` | "off" \| "on" |
| CodeEditor | Placeholder | `string?` | `` | Placeholder text shown when the document is empty; also used as the element's aria-label when set. |
| CodeEditor | OnChange | `EventCallback<string>` | `` | Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs. |
| CodeEditor | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root wrapper div. |
| CodeEditor | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root wrapper div. |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Raised on every edit with the document's current text.
- `OnChange` (`EventCallback<string>`) — Fires alongside ValueChanged; provided for symmetry with Monaco-style APIs.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Example
```razor
<CodeEditor />
```
